more.title: Calls grow for return of executive mayors
more.description: Source: Calls grow for return of executive mayors — CITEZW Calls are mounting for Zimbabwe to reinstate its executive mayor system, amid growing concern that elected mayors and councillors lack the authority needed to run local authorities effectively.
